eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Garrard, KY; at 08:09 AM ON MAR 4, 2026 Effective until 08:24 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: TEST EXERCISE MESSAGE ONLY. This is a test. There is no emergency.Garrard County Emergency Management Agency issued a test of its public alerting systems. Again, there is no emergency. This is only a part of a test. TEST EXERCISE MESSAGE This is only a test. There is no emergency. Please check your alerting devices to ensure you are able to receive future messages.
